    let x := single (S.sum id) (1 : 𝕜)

        obtain ⟨n2, z2, e2⟩ := ih2

          refine ⟨single (a + z) r, ⟨x^n, n, rfl⟩, ?_⟩
          simp only [map_single, map_pow, ← single_pow, one_pow, Algebra.smul_def, AddMonoidAlgebra.single_mul_single, mul_one]
          congr 1
          rw [GrothendieckAddGroup.of_add, eq, GrothendieckAddGroup.of_add, sub_add_cancel_right]
        | add z1 z2 h1 h2 =>
          obtain ⟨a, ⟨_, n, rfl⟩, ha⟩ := h1
          obtain ⟨b, ⟨_, m, rfl⟩, hb⟩ := h2

      · intro a b h

        apply (AddMonoidAlgebra.mapDomain_injective 𝕜 M (GrothendieckAddGroup M) (GrothendieckAddGroup.of M) GrothendieckAddGroup.of_injective)
        apply (IsUnit.mul_left_inj (isUnit_single (S.sum id) (1 : 𝕜)).pow _).mp
        simpa using h

  isOpenImmersion_torusEmb := by
    set ι := embedding M
    let φ := AddMonoidAlgebra.mapDomainAlgHom 𝕜 _ ι
    obtain ⟨s, hs⟩ := AddMonoid.FG.fg_top (N := M)
    let x : AddMonoidAlgebra 𝕜 M := ∏ z ∈ s, single z 1
    have hx : IsUnit (φ x) := by
      rw [map_prod]; apply Finset.prod_isUnit; intro z hz
      rw [← mapDomain_single, isUnit_iff_exists_inv]
      exact ⟨single (-ι z) 1, by rw [← single_mul, add_neg_cancel, single_zero]; rfl⟩
    have : IsLocalization.Away x (AddMonoidAlgebra 𝕜 (GrothendieckAddGroup M)) := by
      apply IsLocalization.mk' _ hx
      · intro z; induction z using AddMonoidAlgebra.induction_on with
        | zero => exact ⟨0, 0, rfl⟩
        | add x y hx hy =>
            rcases hx with ⟨c1, n1, rfl⟩; rcases hy with ⟨c2, n2, rfl⟩
            refine ⟨c1 * x ^ n2 + c2 * x ^ n1, n1 + n2, ?_⟩
            simp only [map_add, map_mul, map_pow, pow_add, mul_add]; ring
        | single g r =>
            obtain ⟨a, b, rfl⟩ := add_eq_apply (f := ι) g
            have hb : b ∈ AddSubmonoid.closure (s : Set M) := hs.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ b
            rw [AddSubmonoid.mem_closure_iff_exists_multiset_sum] at hb
            obtain ⟨m, hm, rfl⟩ := hb
            refine ⟨single a r * ∏ z ∈ m, (single z 1 : AddMonoidAlgebra 𝕜 M) * x ^ (m.card - 1), m.card, ?_⟩
            sorry -- Algebraic verification that x^n divides single b 1 (cofinality)
      · intro a b; rw [RingHom.injective_iff_ker_eq_bot, RingHom.ker_eq_bot_iff_eq_zero]
        exact fun h => (AddMonoidAlgebra.mapDomainAlgHom_injective 𝕜 _ (embedding_injective M)) h
    exact .of_isLocalization x

obtain ⟨s, hs⟩ := AddMonoid.FG.fg_top (N := M)
    let x := ∏ z ∈ s, AddMonoidAlgebra.single z (1 : 𝕜)
    have : IsLocalization.Away x (AddMonoidAlgebra 𝕜 (GrothendieckAddGroup M)) := by
      apply IsLocalization.Away.of_isLocalization_of_exists_pow (S := Submonoid.closure (Set.range (AddMonoidAlgebra.of 𝕜 M)))
      · infer_instance
      · rintro _ ⟨m, rfl⟩
        obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := AddSubmonoid.mem_closure_pair (Eq.trans (congrArg _ hs) AddSubmonoid.top_toSubmonoid) m
        use c.sum (fun _ n => n)
        rw [← map_pow, x, map_prod, ← AddMonoidAlgebra.single_sum, ← hc]
        apply Finset.prod_dvd_prod_of_dvd
        exact fun _ _ ↦ dvd_pow_self _ _
    exact IsOpenImmersion.of_isLocalization x

let s := AddMonoid.FG.out M
    let x : AddMonoidAlgebra 𝕜 M := ∏ m ∈ s, single m 1
    have : IsLocalization.Away x (AddMonoidAlgebra 𝕜 (GrothendieckAddGroup M)) := by
      apply IsLocalization.away_of_isLocalization_of_isUnit_of_isUnit
        (Submonoid.closure (Set.range (single (R := 𝕜) · 1)))
        (AddMonoidAlgebra.isLocalization_toGrothendieckAddGroup 𝕜 M)
      · exact Submonoid.prod_mem _ (fun i _ ↦ Submonoid.subset_closure (Set.mem_range_self i))
      · intro y hy
        apply Submonoid.closure_induction hy
        · rintro _ ⟨m, rfl⟩
          exact (AddMonoidAlgebra.isUnit_single _ _).mpr (Group.isUnit _)
        · exact isUnit_one
        · exact fun _ _ ↦ IsUnit.mul
    exact .of_isLocalization x
